# Changelog

Genesis.ai 版本变更记录。


## 31.1.0 (2026-04-01)


### Features

* **compute-usage:** add context accumulation curve and prompt cache hit rate tracking

* **docs:** Docs paths have changed, update all links

## 30.1.0 (2026-04-01)


### Bug Fixes

* **topic-insights:** increase description character limit from 10k to 50k
* **test:** resolve unhandled rejection in fetchEvidence test
* **table-management:** calculate actual cleanable space instead of hardcoded 30% estimate
* **deploy:** set NODE_OPTIONS globally to prevent OOM in diagnose/deploy scripts
* **import:** handle orphaned rawDataId when raw_data cleanup deletes referenced records
* **table-management:** include stuck PROCESSING/EXECUTING/PENDING in cleanup policies
* **table-management:** add VACUUM after cleanup to reclaim disk space
* **import:** detect junk titles from PDF query URLs (e.g. openreview.net/pdf?id=xxx)
* **import:** user-provided title must override auto-parsed metadata
* **explore:** send user-edited title when importing URL
* **explore:** detect OpenReview /pdf?id= URLs as PDF and enhance proxy headers
* resolve code review P1 issues
* **report:** stop sanitizeReport from breaking LaTeX formulas + fix chapter view citation anchors
* **proxy:** rewrite relative URLs to absolute in proxied HTML
* **export:** enable TOC and citation anchor navigation in PDF exports
* **export:** support TOC and citation anchor navigation in PDF/HTML exports
* **report:** collapse consecutive dashes in heading slugs
* resolve code review issues (P1/P3) and archive old doc
* **report:** fix fullReport completeness check dropping chart placeholders
* **report:** proxy external figure images to avoid CORS/hotlink failures
* **proxy:** use full page path for base tag instead of hostname only
* **explore:** show Reader/Original toggle for PAPER type HTML pages
* **explore:** fix ContentPreview PDF fallback when pdfUrl is null
* **explore:** fix ExploreContent PDF detection treating HTML URLs as PDF
* **explore:** prevent arXiv HTML pages from opening as PDF
* **report:** fix in-page TOC and footnote anchor navigation
* **topic-insights:** resolve 6 audit issues (P1/P2/P3)
* **proxy:** use original URL for Puppeteer fallback when redirect detected
* **proxy:** improve SPA detection with stripped text length and redirect check
* **proxy:** add SPA/CSR detection with Puppeteer fallback for reader mode
* **proxy:** remove domain whitelist from HTML proxy endpoints
* **explore:** handle 403 sites with content fallback and async fetch
* **topic-insights:** add confirmation before generating public share link
* **explore:** fix PDF detection in ExploreDetail sidebar preview
* **explore:** use HTML viewer when sourceUrl is HTML paper link
* **topic-insights:** use dimension sortOrder for chapter numbering
* **report:** merge fragmented LaTeX formulas with misplaced $ delimiters
* **export:** move temp file cleanup AFTER page.pdf() completes
* **export:** extract base64 images to temp files before Puppeteer render
* **backend:** add --max-old-space-size=3072 to nixpacks start command
* **backend:** use node directly instead of nest start for heap limit
* **backend:** increase Node.js heap limit to 3GB for large PDF exports
* **topic-insights:** widen report_synthesis task query in revision handler
* **topic-insights:** fix quality review badge showing needsRevision for passing scores
* **topic-insights:** hide input/output subtext when both are 0
* **topic-insights:** fix 0 tokens/calls and add model timeline chart
* **topic-insights:** fix hardcoded strings and lint issues in ComputeUsageTab
* **e2e:** resolve all remaining E2E test failures
* **test:** update stale test expectations for brand name and empty response
* **e2e:** improve page load waits and fix insights create API DTO
* **report:** protect existing math blocks in wrapInlineLatex
* **report:** use brace-counting for \text{}} repair instead of lookbehind
* **report:** fix repairLatexCommands destroying nested \text{} braces
* **topic-insights:** rebuild continuous view from dimensionAnalyses when fullReport is truncated
* **topic-insights:** add safety net for fullReport truncation in synthesis
* **export:** add toast warning when WYSIWYG export falls back to editable mode
* **ai-engine:** force openai apiFormat for OpenAI-compatible providers
* **ai-infra:** add Groq, OpenRouter, MiniMax display names and icons
* **ai-engine:** add Groq, OpenRouter, MiniMax to BYOK and direct-key
* **ai-engine:** add Groq, OpenRouter, MiniMax to connection test switch
* **topic-insights:** add missing DI mocks in dimension-writing tests
* **topic-insights:** fix completion time, model unknown, and model backfill
* **topic-insights:** remove old QualityProbePanel, add language-adaptive evaluation
* **topic-insights:** persist modelUsed in dimension_analyses for per-chapter evaluation
* **cors:** return false instead of throwing error for rejected origins
* **topic-insights:** fix EVALUATOR model fallback — use CHAT modelType when falling back to CHAT model
* **admin:** add EVALUATOR model type to AI model management dropdown
* **topic-insights:** improve figure quality by filtering blog decorations and prioritizing credible sources
* **ai-engine:** inject JSON constraint prompt for deepseek-reasoner instead of silent strip
* **topic-insights:** eliminate reportId race condition by chaining evidence fetch
* **topic-insights:** fix stale reportId race condition when switching topics
* **topic-insights:** add null guard for evidence response in fetchEvidence
* **topic-insights:** correct i18n key for insights team panel title
* **topic-insights:** rename team label, fix duration, merge undersized sections
* **ai-engine:** strip response_format for deepseek-reasoner to prevent INVALID_REQUEST
* **topic-insights:** render reference figures in shared report view
* **brand:** fix irregular hexagon — normalize all node radii to R=22
* **topic-insights:** fix figure-source mismatch — arxiv relative URL + supplement attribution
* **topic-insights:** replace in-process mutex with Redis distributed lock for citationIndex safety
* **topic-insights:** serialize saveEvidence per-report to prevent citationIndex race condition

## 13.1.0 (2026-03-02)


### Features

* **admin:** add missing stats to all admin overview architecture cards

### Refactoring

* **facade:** migrate AIEngineFacade consumers to domain facades

### Bug Fixes

* **kernel:** inline calculateOverallProgress to break circular import

## [8.0.0](https://github.com/your-org/ai-teams-engine/compare/v3.50.0...v8.0.0) (2026-03-01)


### ⚠ BREAKING CHANGES

* **docs:** Docs paths have changed, update all links

## 4.1.0 (2026-03-01)


### Bug Fixes

* **ai-engine:** resolve review findings - L2/L4 boundary, model fallback, test quality
* **kernel-admin:** unwrap API response envelope in all 8 kernel admin pages
* **ai-kernel:** fix observability page crash and rename L4 to AI Agents
* **ai-social:** add type annotations to $queryRaw calls to fix TS18046 errors
* **ai-kernel:** probe table existence before starting DB-dependent schedulers
* **ai-kernel:** gracefully disable scheduler when agent_processes table is missing
* **ai-kernel:** remove A2AApiKeyGuard from DI providers to fix production crash
* **ai-kernel:** remove A2ATeamMemberAdapter from DI providers to fix production crash
* **api:** forward Authorization header in insights and quick-action API routes
* **frontend:** add --insecure-http-parser to tolerate Railway CDN chunked encoding
* **lint:** remove unused VersionComparison import in version-diff test
* **test:** fix 5 failing frontend test files
* **test:** use getAttribute instead of .src/.alt in ModelBadge test
* **credits:** eliminate ADJUSTMENT leak by attributing explore/planning charges correctly
* **api:** bypass CDN proxy for all browser API calls in production
* **auth:** harden auth against CDN outages and fix fallback ports
* **auth:** bypass CDN proxy for OAuth token exchange
* **core:** guard Server-Timing header against ERR_HTTP_HEADERS_SENT crash
* **arch:** address P0+P1 findings from architecture audit v2.0
* **admin:** align agent page to light theme and add AI auto-fill
* **docker:** guarantee @genesis-ai/core as real files after prune
* **docker:** monorepo-aware build for @genesis-ai/core package
* **ai-core:** remove hardcoded model="gemini" defaults in controller
* **arch:** update ESLint paths for bounded contexts and remove LLM hardcoding
* **test:** restore IMAGE_MODELS import removed by lint fix
* **admin:** correct Agent OS card navigation and architecture layout
* **ai:** remove all hardcoded model names, use empty string fallback
* **auth:** use LoginDto/RegisterDto in controller to enforce validation
* **frontend:** add sharp as optional dependency for standalone image optimization
* **frontend:** remove /api/v1 prefix from apiClient paths (double-prefix bug)
* **multi:** overview stats display, 401 auth fixes, YouTube duration filter
* **timers:** add .unref() to all module-level timers and fix floating promises
* **eslint:** extend memory no-restricted-imports to cover abstractions and coordinator
* **ai-arch:** address P1/P2 audit items and code quality issues
* **ai-arch:** eliminate 13 hardcoded LLM model strings (P1-4)
* **backend:** restore Record<string, any> with eslint-disable in google-drive-auth updateConnection
* **frontend:** use !== undefined check for Promise-typed inFlight guard in creditsStore
* **tsconfig:** exclude spec files from backend type-check; revert character dto
* **frontend-tests:** resolve type errors in store test fixtures
* **ai-arch:** address P2/P3 issues from code review
* **ai-arch:** resolve all P1/P2 issues from v3 architecture audit
* **ai-arch:** apply code review findings from Batch 7/8 deep review
* **debate:** clear A2A bus session on debate completion to prevent memory leak
* **ai-insights:** fix orphaned trace spans on quality review and synthesis errors
* **agent-os:** address code review issues
* **ai-insights:** hide 申请加入 button for PUBLIC topics, only show for SHARED
* **ai-office:** mark themes/list as @Public to allow unauthenticated access
* **research-idea:** re-query insight IDs before createMany to prevent FK violation race condition
* **ai-ask:** use step.input (LLM-extracted topic) instead of raw userInput for ActionCard URL
* **ai-ask:** fix ActionCards visibility and insight auto-create from ?q= param
* **intent-router:** improve insight module detection for 洞察/analyse intents
* **agent-os:** fix confidence threshold, logging, urlTemplate guard, image phase and tests
* **ai-bar:** pass isDark to AIMessageRenderer for readable contrast on dark bg
* **ai-bar:** render markdown in bar result, fix sessionId navigation to ai-ask
* **frontend:** fix url params not applied when searchParams null on first render
* **ai-ask:** address code review findings
* **review:** address 13 issues found in deep code review
* **pillar1:** route /.well-known/agent.json correctly + fix SSE test timer leak
* **quality:** address P0/P1 issues found in AI App quality audit
* **comments:** add @Public() to all read-only and upvote endpoints
* **ai-engine:** enforce architecture boundary — AI Apps must use AIEngineFacade
* **ai-engine:** address second-round review issues + unblock tsc
* **ai-engine:** address W1-W6 code review issues
* **explore:** add copy button to YouTube video AI chat messages
* **explore:** prevent setState-on-unmount warning in AIChatMessages copy timer
* **explore:** add copy button and fix markdown list markers in YouTube tab chat
* **explore:** add copy button to AI messages and fix markdown list markers in Papers/News tabs
* **explore:** fix AI chat bubble width and add TextSelectionToolbar to Papers chat
* **explore:** remove prose max-width cap on AI chat response bubble
* **ui:** increase spacing between logo and nav in Sidebar
* **cors:** allow opaque origin 'null' string from browser preflight
* **ui:** fix 3 production bugs - export wysiwyg, related research error, snippet quality
* **ai-engine:** address remaining review defects to restore quality score
* **ai-engine:** close 3 review defects from system hardening
* **ui:** remove debug console.log and fix remaining emoji violations

### Refactoring

* **ai-engine:** phase 6 - export domain facades and begin consumer migration
* **ai-engine:** phase 5 - split God Facade into 5 domain facades
* **ai-kernel:** phase 4 - kernel L3 compliance, zero ai-engine imports
* **modules:** phase 3 - move content business modules from ai-engine to ai-app
* **modules:** phase 2 complete - finalize ai-app directory framework
* **modules:** phase 2 directory restructuring - batch 1
* **ai-kernel:** extract kernel facade and move KernelContext to common layer
* **admin:** rename L6 "Agent OS" to "Gateway" (智能网关)
* **backend:** reorganize modules into 6-layer architecture
* **frontend:** replace emoji icons with Lucide React in AI Store tabs
* **ai-engine:** slim AIEngineFacade constructor via Feature Token expansion (38→20 params)
* **core:** replace 42 backend source files with @genesis-ai/core re-export bridges
* **arch:** decouple research via Facade late-registration pattern
* **arch:** achieve zero facade violations and remove all ESLint exclusions
* **arch:** split facade into base-classes.ts to eliminate all exceptions
* **arch:** enforce facade imports for all ai-app/core/mcp-server modules
* **ai-engine:** remove all shim dirs, make bounded contexts canonical
* **ai-engine:** phase 1 - consolidate safety domain into safety/
* **ai-engine:** consolidate 30 flat dirs into 9 bounded contexts
* **arch:** fix P3 cross-App module direct dependencies
* **ai-arch:** clean up P3 audit items (Batch 8)
* **ai-arch:** fix any types across ai-app and ai-engine modules (Batch 7)
* **ai-arch:** route ContentFetchService through AIEngineFacade in social module
* **ai-arch:** route all ai-app engine imports through AIEngineFacade
* **ai-engine:** expose EmbeddingService/VectorService getters via Facade, fix RAG violations
* **ai-engine:** expose LongContentEngine/ContinuationProtocol/TeamInfo via Facade
* **ai-engine:** expose orchestration services via Facade, fix teams violations
* **ai-engine:** expose EmbeddingService/VectorService/MCPManager/Capability via Facade
* **ai-teams:** remove dead VotingManager and HandoffCoordinator injections
* **ai-engine:** remove LLMFactory and A2AMessageBus from app layer
* **ai-engine:** migrate 6 remaining engine violations to Facade
* **common:** move BrowserService from ai-engine to common/browser
* **ai-engine:** expose ReflectionService and ContextCompressionService through AIEngineFacade
* **ai-engine:** expose IntentRouter and A2ABus through AIEngineFacade
* **ai-engine:** expose MemoryCoordinator through AIEngineFacade
* **ai-engine:** expose TraceCollector through AIEngineFacade
* **docs:** flatten docs directory structure
* **brand:** replace inline SVG logo with new AI-generated PNG logo
* **brand:** restore node-ring SVG logo from original design
* **brand:** replace PNG logo with SVG orbital icon
* **research:** extract project dialogs into standalone components
* **ai:** system-wide evaluation fixes — 23 tasks across AI Engine and AI Apps
* **ai-engine:** migrate 6 services from AI Apps to AI Engine core
* **finance-api:** migrate API key to Secrets Manager
* **brand:** comprehensive cleanup of all raven/deepdive references
* **brand:** replace remaining raven references with genesis
* **brand:** revert to original layout with Genesis + AI ENGINE subtitle
* centralize brand configuration with env var support
* **planning:** quality overhaul for AI planning output
* **nav:** move AI Teams to planning group and rename to AI 探讨
* **research:** restructure AI Research into discussion-ideas-demos pipeline

### Features

* **ai-kernel:** complete KernelContext.run() integration for remaining AI Apps
* **ai-kernel:** full Kernel integration via KernelContext + ProgressTracker + Memory
* **ai-kernel:** production fixes + deep Kernel integration across all layers
* **ai-kernel:** make all 8 kernel cards configurable and integrate process tracking across AI apps

* **core:** initialize @genesis-ai/core package with extracted pure TS abstractions

* **ai-arch:** update ESLint no-restricted-imports to enforce facade boundary
* **ai-arch:** expose Registry getters via Facade, re-export types from facade/index
* **observability:** add TraceCollector to AI Writing and AI Office
* **ai-insights:** integrate TraceCollector into TopicTeamOrchestratorService
* **a2a:** integrate A2AMessageBus into Research Discussion pipeline
* **a2a:** integrate A2AMessageBus into MissionOrchestrator and DebateService
* **agent-os:** phase 1+2 - traces, replanning, A2A bus
* **ai-research:** add PRIVATE/PUBLIC visibility control + improve demo prototype prompt
* **admin:** add Agent OS layer to architecture diagram
* **agent-os:** implement pgvector, memory feedback, module registry and AI bar
* **ai-ask:** add ai os unified entry with intent detection and action cards
* **pillar6:** add chat mode to Knowledge Graph page
* **pillar3:** wire KnowledgeGraphTool as Layer 4 in MemoryCoordinator
* **pillar6:** add capability search entry to sidebar
* **pillar6:** add Human-in-the-Loop approval UI and admin API
* **pillar5:** add quality history feedback loop to IntelligentModelRouter
* **pillar6:** add MultimodalInput component with drag-drop image/PDF/doc support
* **pillar5:** add Eval Dashboard admin page + POST traces/:id/evaluate endpoint
* **pillar6:** add AgentTimeline UI component with real-time span polling
* **pillar5:** add EvalPipelineService — 3-layer AI quality evaluation
* **pillar3:** add MemoryCoordinatorService — unified 4-layer memory OS
* **pillar2:** add IntentRouterService + TaskPlannerService (GenesisAgent orchestration)
* **pillar6:** add Global AI Bar — Cmd+K AI command palette
* **pillar4:** add ComplexityAnalyzer + IntelligentModelRouter
* **ai-engine:** system hardening — honest errors, taskProfile, JSON mode, Redis, DB traces
* **cross-module:** implement ai insights → research → slides integration
* **slides:** redesign left panel as AI chat center, improve edit reply quality
* **slides:** implement AI chat edit for slide pages
* **slides:** redesign workspace with slide navigator + AI chat panel
* **mcp-server:** switch genesis_deep_research to async mode with SSE delivery
* **tools:** add finance-data capability to tools management UI
* **tools:** add Alpha Vantage finance API to external tools management
* **brand:** redesign logo to Orbital Core - AI team concept
* **brand:** enlarge logo with colorful CSS glow and version badge as superscript
* **brand:** use original PNG logo and clean up all remaining brand refs

* **export:** upgrade fonts to Inter + Microsoft YaHei/Noto Sans SC
* **planning:** add full planning process WYSIWYG export
* **office:** refactor slides engine to AI-adaptive HTML generation (v6.0)
* **research:** add rename and delete actions to project cards
* **research:** add project naming dialog before creating new research
* **research:** add bilingual (zh-CN/en-US) support for discussion research
* **research:** 5-tab refactor with insights/creative ideas separation
* **research:** structured idea extraction with expandable cards
* **research:** structured idea cards with click-to-expand detail

### Performance

* **frontend:** bypass Next.js rewrite proxy for credits and topic-insights requests
* **api:** optimize slow endpoints and enable request performance tracking
* **api:** fix slow page load - 6 api endpoints optimized
* **slides:** fix sourceText over-sending to LLM pipeline

## 3.74.0 (2026-02-17)

### Refactoring

- **research:** extract project dialogs into standalone components
- **ai:** system-wide evaluation fixes — 23 tasks across AI Engine and AI Apps
- **ai-engine:** migrate 6 services from AI Apps to AI Engine core
- **finance-api:** migrate API key to Secrets Manager
- **brand:** comprehensive cleanup of all raven/deepdive references
- **brand:** replace remaining raven references with genesis
- **brand:** revert to original layout with Genesis + AI ENGINE subtitle
- centralize brand configuration with env var support
- **planning:** quality overhaul for AI planning output
- **nav:** move AI Teams to planning group and rename to AI 探讨
- **research:** restructure AI Research into discussion-ideas-demos pipeline

### Bug Fixes

- **admin:** add FINANCE category to SecretsManager CATEGORY_OPTIONS
- **deps:** resolve circular dependency in DiscussionModule and MCPServerModule
- **admin:** add forwardRef for AiEngineModule import
- **content-processing:** add forwardRef to break circular dependency chain
- **content-fetch:** break circular dependency via optional YoutubeService injection
- **export:** pass exportScope to backend for full planning export
- **export:** reduce WYSIWYG payload size and add editable fallback
- **export:** add dedicated API route to bypass rewrite proxy for large bodies
- **export:** increase timeout for export POST to prevent ECONNRESET
- **explore:** add missing auth header to thumbnail extract request
- **explore:** add missing auth header to resource PATCH request
- **scheduler:** sync collection rules with actual data source categories
- **scheduler:** persist enabled/interval config to database via SettingsService
- **brand:** move version badge inline next to brand name
- **planning:** strengthen Phase 1 to focus on problem decomposition not solutions
- **teams:** handle nullable metadata in planning topic exclusion filter
- **i18n:** complete AI 团队 → AI 探讨 rename in zh.json
- **teams:** exclude planning topics from teams list and add playwright
- **planning:** improve orchestrator execution architecture for output quality
- **slides:** enforce real FA icons, layout variety, clean cover, and 4 KPI cards
- **slides:** tighten design system prompt for title brevity and visual balance
- **slides:** improve design system prompt and fix skill runtime issues
- **research:** improve generate demo button UX with feedback and duplicate guard
- **research:** use text markers for citations in markdown rendering
- **research:** render report content as markdown with proper formatting
- **research:** limit insights to top 30 for creative idea extraction
- **research:** case-insensitive feasibility filter for creative ideas
- **research:** extend recovery polling to 15 minutes to match synthesis timeout
- **research:** add SSE heartbeat and safe write to prevent proxy idle disconnect
- **research:** parallelize report section generation to prevent synthesis timeout
- **research:** eliminate double report generation in synthesis phase
- **research:** increase synthesis timeout to 8min and protect streaming
- **research:** fix empty reports/ideas with timeout increase and recovery
- **research:** auto-correct stale discussion sessions stuck in intermediate states
- **research:** improve h3 heading styling and add missing i18n keys
- **research:** add markdown formatting to all discussion phase prompts
- **research:** improve discussion output hierarchy and add team panel controls
- **search:** use 24h cooldown for quota-exhausted API keys instead of 5min
- **ai-engine:** resolve preferred model by modelType instead of passing raw enum string
- **research:** fix demos tab flickering caused by polling loop
- **research:** fix ideas extraction state management
- **research:** ai-powered idea extraction + multi-call report generation
- **research:** fix project list parsing, ideas extraction, and report quality
- **research:** fix SSE streaming and agent hexagon layout
- **research:** deep review fixes for AgentPanel, DiscussionChat, and history viewing
- **research:** fix stale closure causing empty discussion history
- **research:** fix broken connector lines in PhaseIndicator
- **research:** refactor left panel collapse to match AI Insights pattern
- **research:** add empty state for session history with no discussion messages
- **research:** fix left panel and chat overflow with proper flex height chain
- **research:** render JSON directions as cards and fix layout overflow
- **social:** skip xiaohongshu MCP registration when XHS_MCP_URL not set
- **research:** fix SSE parser losing events across TCP chunks
- **research:** add auth header to SSE stream and ensure DB migration runs
- **credits:** add missing CreditTransactionType enum values to deploy script
- **research:** fix DB migration for discussion-driven research
- **data-collection:** restore .data access for self-wrapped list endpoints
- **data-collection:** fix response unwrapping causing batch collection failure
- **ui:** update initial notifications with useful actionUrls
- **ui:** move changelog link to header version badge, remove sidebar item
- **build:** handle Docker build where root package.json is absent
- **ui:** make notification cards clickable and add What's New to sidebar

### Features

- **tools:** add finance-data capability to tools management UI
- **tools:** add Alpha Vantage finance API to external tools management
- **brand:** redesign logo to Orbital Core - AI team concept
- **brand:** enlarge logo with colorful CSS glow and version badge as superscript
- **brand:** use original PNG logo and clean up all remaining brand refs
- **brand:** rebrand to Genesis.ai with new squirrel logo
- **export:** upgrade fonts to Inter + Microsoft YaHei/Noto Sans SC
- **planning:** add full planning process WYSIWYG export
- **office:** refactor slides engine to AI-adaptive HTML generation (v6.0)
- **research:** add rename and delete actions to project cards
- **research:** add project naming dialog before creating new research
- **research:** add bilingual (zh-CN/en-US) support for discussion research
- **research:** 5-tab refactor with insights/creative ideas separation
- **research:** structured idea extraction with expandable cards
- **research:** structured idea cards with click-to-expand detail
- **research:** implement discussion-driven deep research

## 3.71.0 (2026-02-14)

### Bug Fixes

- **insights:** replace old export dropdown with unified export service
- **export:** fix pptxgenjs import for CommonJS compatibility
- **export:** reset export state when user changes format or render mode
- **export:** route DOCX/PPTX through proper renderers in WYSIWYG mode
- **export:** align transformPlanning with actual PlanningTopicMetadata structure
- **export:** resolve cascading export failures in Puppeteer and PDFKit paths
- **search:** pass filtered validKeys to getHealthyKey in key retry loop
- **review:** address code review findings across planning, social, and MCP modules
- **social,mcp:** resolve XHS type errors and increase proxy timeout
- **search,mcp:** fix key rotation bugs and MCP proxy timeout handling
- **ai-planning:** eliminate placeholder text and duplicate references in delivery report
- **ai-planning:** add citation links to phase output and fix paragraph breaks
- **ai-planning:** render <br> line breaks in table cells instead of stripping them
- **ai-planning:** support table style alignment and clickable citation links
- **ai-planning:** Phase 6 produces single refined report instead of concatenated duplicates
- **topic-insights:** add Quick View button to actual report toolbar
- **ai-planning:** report tab shows formal Phase 6 delivery only, not process log
- **ai-planning:** show full report with Phase 6 as primary, not replacement
- **ui:** fallback to main-thread mermaid when CDN importScripts fails
- **ai-planning:** show both debaters (pro + con) for comprehensive depth
- **ai-planning:** fix table rendering with narrow columns and <br> tags
- **ai-planning:** fix polling gap during auto-advance between phases
- **ai-planning:** prevent context overflow for delivery phase
- **ai-planning:** add proper markdown rendering with tables, mermaid, and scroll UX
- **ai-planning:** fix status corruption and empty phase completion
- **ai-planning:** stabilize polling and fix phase skip
- **ai-planning:** overhaul detail page UX to match AI Insights quality
- **ai-planning:** address code review issues for quality parity with AI Insights
- **test:** add mcp-server to test:quick ignore list for pre-existing timeout failures
- **ci:** pre-push lint check should not block on pre-existing warnings
- **cors:** allow health check and server-to-server requests without Origin header
- **quality:** deep code review fixes across security, API, frontend, and CI/CD
- **quality:** eliminate 84+ any types across 6 backend production files
- **quality:** activate AgentConfig runtime, MCP tool proxy, and clean 84 any instances
- **mcp-server:** resolve critical race condition, memory leak, and security issues
- resolve 37+ TS errors, fix critical bugs, update test suites
- **mcp-server:** convert guard exceptions to JSON-RPC error format
- **mcp-server:** fix crash on null response and ensure raw JSON-RPC output
- **mcp-server:** handle null response for JSON-RPC notifications
- **mcp-server:** return raw JSON-RPC responses without envelope wrapper
- **admin:** fix API Keys tab not visible due to i18n key mismatch
- **slides:** resolve prompt SKILL.md not found at runtime

### Features

- **export:** add Topic Insights export and fix config change state reset
- **export:** unified WYSIWYG export system for all AI modules
- **ai-planning:** add replan functionality for completed plans
- **ai-planning:** upgrade Phase 6 delivery report to consulting-grade quality
- **ai-planning:** add inline edit for plan name on list cards
- **topic-insights:** improve report quality with prompt trimming, quick view, and citation folding
- **ai-planning:** add credibility scoring, LLM queries, citation rendering, and report overhaul
- **ai-planning:** add web search references and fix polling reliability
- **ai-planning:** rebuild execution engine aligned with AI Insights
- **integrations:** replace WeChat Work with Feishu integration
- **ai-planning:** rewrite plan detail panels matching AI Insights UX
- **ai-planning:** refactor plan detail page UX with split layout
- **ai-planning:** add AI Planning module — multi-agent collaborative planning platform
- **openness:** add public REST API, agent config, research templates, MCP registry
- **topic-insights:** P0/P1 competitive advantage improvements (+4754 lines)
- **monitoring:** unified health check, MCP observability bridge
- **ai-engine:** observability, prompt registry, structured output, cost attribution, CI/CD
- **mcp-server:** full MCP protocol with dynamic tool bridge, resources, prompts, and capability gateway
- **admin:** add API Keys tab to MCP Server management page
- **admin:** add Open API layer to architecture diagram
- **admin:** add MCP Server admin page with monitoring UI
- **mcp-server:** connect tools to backend, add admin monitoring
- **skills:** per-AI-app skills management with effectiveness tracking

### Refactoring

- **ai-planning:** replace inline edit with dialog-based plan editing
- **ai-engine:** DB persistence, model resolver extraction, unit tests
- **mcp-server:** unified timeout, research facade, and SKILL.md manifest

- remove unnecessary IMAGE_GENERATION migration ([bb0c6ab](https://github.com/your-org/ai-teams-engine/commit/bb0c6abdaacff7a69fe491692d90013481b135a1))
- restore STORAGE_ADMIN_KEY to recommended env vars ([42e720a](https://github.com/your-org/ai-teams-engine/commit/42e720ac308863f764536abcb60b2b6defbfe318))
- restore to last working state c1e1995 ([33e8ebf](https://github.com/your-org/ai-teams-engine/commit/33e8ebf0fe683a2656531c284243d11a83101a65))
- Revert ai-image.service.ts to fix errors ([6bf1195](https://github.com/your-org/ai-teams-engine/commit/6bf1195bb9893fd2309577d5a3f5cb573b3482a6))
- rollback AI Engine delegation - causing execution to hang ([905aa74](https://github.com/your-org/ai-teams-engine/commit/905aa748e9a9eb9b91571e12899e3175678a3862))
- use PAPER icon for arXiv papers temporarily ([9258e5d](https://github.com/your-org/ai-teams-engine/commit/9258e5d8b7dcf68c2874ddeedbf8a9d4b32c693a))

### BREAKING CHANGES

- **ai-writing:** AI writing flow now creates world settings before
  planning chapter structure. This ensures chapters comply with world rules.

Changes:

- Phase 1: Bible Keeper builds world settings independently
- Phase 2: Story Architect plans chapters based on world settings
- Updated prompts to enforce world rule compliance
- Updated frontend progress steps order
- Added world-building step to phase mapping

This architectural improvement ensures story consistency by establishing
"game rules" (world settings) before planning the narrative structure.

# [2.1.0](https://github.com/your-org/ai-teams-engine/compare/8793daf38c60f3d863cb47fc2618ec36e1b64c20...v2.1.0) (2025-11-14)

### Bug Fixes
